command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2JxPWVMXcgLmzJd.root --database Ve29H94aZcWFrpYwT4447v --execute 
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS merchantSettings (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  tenantId INT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  preferences JSON,
  theme JSON,
  notifications JSON,
  autoAllocation BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  smsConfig JSON,
  emailConfig JSON,
  templates JSON,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS userMerchantAccess (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  tenantId INT NOT NULL,
  grantedBy INT NOT NULL,
  grantedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE KEY uq_user_tenant (userId, tenantId)
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_merchantSettings_tenantId ON merchantSettings(tenantId);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_userMerchantAccess_userId ON userMerchantAccess(userId);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_userMerchantAccess_tenantId ON userMerchantAccess(tenantId);
